meaning: adj.漂浮的,浮动的,移动的,流动的,不固定的
examples: A plastic bag was floating in the water.
Floating can be a very pleasant sensation.
Survivors clung to pieces of floating debris.
Floating sensors hold the oxygen to between 2 and 2.5 parts per million of water.
Floating sensors hold the oxygen to between 2.0 and 2.5 parts per million of water.
